fields.name: Margherita Pizza
fields.description: Classic tomato base with fresh mozzarella, basil leaves, and a drizzle of olive oil on our signature hand-tossed crust.

fields.name: Pepperoni Supreme
fields.description: Loaded with premium pepperoni, mozzarella, bell peppers, and our signature tomato sauce on crispy dough.

fields.name: BBQ Chicken Pizza
fields.description: Smoky BBQ sauce, grilled chicken, red onions, cilantro, and mozzarella on our golden crust.

fields.name: Classic Smash Burger
fields.description: Double smashed patties, American cheese, pickles, onions, and our secret sauce on a toasted brioche bun.

fields.name: Spicy Jalapeño Burger
fields.description: Beef patty, pepper jack cheese, jalapeños, chipotle mayo, and crispy onions. Not for the faint of heart!

fields.name: Veggie Black Bean Burger
fields.description: House-made black bean patty with avocado, tomato, lettuce, and garlic aioli on a whole wheat bun.

fields.name: Dragon Roll
fields.description: Shrimp tempura and cucumber topped with avocado, tobiko, and spicy mayo. A fan favorite.

fields.name: Salmon Nigiri (6pcs)
fields.description: Fresh Atlantic salmon over seasoned sushi rice, served with wasabi and pickled ginger.

fields.name: Spaghetti Carbonara
fields.description: Al dente spaghetti with crispy pancetta, eggs, Pecorino Romano, and freshly cracked black pepper.

fields.name: Penne Arrabbiata
fields.description: Penne pasta in a fiery tomato sauce with garlic, red chillies, and fresh parsley. Bold and simple.

fields.name: Caesar Salad
fields.description: Crisp romaine lettuce, house-made Caesar dressing, parmesan shavings, and golden croutons.

fields.name: Greek Salad
fields.description: Cherry tomatoes, cucumber, Kalamata olives, red onion, feta cheese, and herb vinaigrette.

fields.name: Chocolate Lava Cake
fields.description: Warm dark chocolate cake with a gooey molten center, served with vanilla ice cream and berry coulis.

fields.name: Tiramisu
fields.description: Classic Italian dessert with espresso-soaked ladyfingers, mascarpone cream, and a dusting of cocoa powder.

fields.name: Fresh Lemonade
fields.description: Freshly squeezed lemonade with mint, served over ice. Sweet, tart, and refreshing.

fields.name: Mango Smoothie
fields.description: Blended fresh mango with yogurt and honey. A tropical escape in every sip.
